scripts.build: pnpm --filter @ghost/types run build && pnpm --filter @ghost/protocol run build && pnpm --filter @ghost/tokens run build && pnpm --filter @ghost/desktop run build && rm -rf apps/server/public/assets && cp -r apps/desktop/dist/assets apps/server/public/assets && cp apps/desktop/dist/index.html apps/server/public/index.html && cp apps/desktop/dist/sw.js apps/server/public/sw.js && cp apps/desktop/dist/warped-playback-worklet.js apps/server/public/warped-playback-worklet.js && cp apps/desktop/dist/master-limiter-worklet.js apps/server/public/master-limiter-worklet.js
scripts.start: pnpm run build && cd apps/server && npx tsx src/index.ts
